products.fullDescription: POWER FLASH 9V ULTRA ALKALINE BATTERIES. These 9 Volt alkaline batteries have long-lasting power with low self-discharge. It is offered as a pack of 12 batteries. Ideal for devices with high power consumption including musical Instruments, radio, camera,controller, smoke alarm,smoke detector, electronic toys, medical equipment. The batteries comply with the currently valid EU directive and meet the highest requirements for safety and longevity. The shelf life of these batteries is up to 5 years, meaning the batteries can remain in storage for up to 5 years and still correspond to the standards of IEC60086. These 9V batteries have greater efficiency and longer battery life and can be used in the temperature range from -20°C to + 50°C. POWER FLASH batteries have been successfully tested for electrical, thermal, geometric and mechanical requirements. Through rigorous testing, we can guarantee the highest product quality. Our quality experts regularly monitor compliance with our high standards and international standards.

products.fullDescription:
• High Capacity 1.5V / 2600mWh AA Rechargeable Batteries: The voltage of the rechargeable AA batteries is 1.5v. Constant 1.5v output can make the devices work more stable; Strong power, same effect with the alkaline aa batteries. The usb aa battery is perfect for toys, remote controls, etc. High capacity 2600mWh makes it long lasting and durable.
  • Easy to Charge with Type C Cable: Unique usb charging design, the rechargeable aa batteries were built-in advanced type c port. You can charge the 2 AA batteries at a time with the included 2-in-1 usb type c cable, no need the traditional AA battery charger or adapter any more.
  • Fast Charging in 2 Hours: It can be fully charged in 1.5-2hours with the usb type c cable. Built-in LED charging indicator, the Red LED blinks when charging; The Red LED remains on when fully charged. The LED is at the charging type c port.
  • 1000+ Cycles & Eco Friendly USB AA Battery: Thanks to the advanced technology, the usb rechargeable aa batteries can be recharged 1000+ times, saving thousands of alkaline aa batteries, reducing pollution and save money for you.
  • Safe & Quality Guaranteed: Built-in integrated safety circuit protects, the 1.5v lithium AA rechargeable batteries have over charge protection, over discharge protection, and short circuit protection. It also has passed the test of CE, RoHS, PAHs, FCC, IEC62133, 2006/66/EC, etc. Very safe during using and safe for your health.

products.fullDescription:
Cielo Breez is a plug & play smart air conditioner controller. It’s simple to install. You can hang it on the wall or place it on a table in AC / Heat Pump's line of sight. Breez directly connects to your home Wi-Fi router and controls your air conditioner through IR signals. Download "Cielo Home" app and register your device. No additional hub or wiring is needed.

Cielo Breez lets you control your air conditioners and heat pumps through smartphone from anywhere in the world. It helps you save up to 25% on your energy bills. Cielo Breez is compatible with Amazon Alexa and the Google Assistant. Just refer to Alexa and say; “Alexa, Power On Bedroom” or to the Google Assistant saying; "Hey Google, Power on the Bedroom" and it will be done.

Saves up your AC energy bills.
Plug & Play

products.fullDescription:
Solar Panel Tester - Measure MPPT Power Output Rating, Open Circuit Voltage Smart Tester | Digital Monitor | Solar Panel Multimeter

  • 【MPPT Technology】The MPPT Solar Controller measures the maximum power point output of your solar panel to optimize charging efficiency.
  • 【Solar Panel Measurements】The device can also measure the open circuit voltage of your solar panel, giving you a better understanding of its performance.
  • 【Real-Time Display】With a real-time display for input and output voltage and current, you can monitor your system's performance at all times.
  • 【Easy to Connect】The MPPT Solar Controller comes with connectors included, making it easy to set up and use.
  • 【Smart Tester】The device features a smart tester to measure the performance and quality of your solar panel, ensuring optimal charging efficiency.

products.fullDescription:
• 120W Power Meter, SWR Meter, Digital SWR Meter FMB/VHF UHF 80-999MHz 120W Power, FMB VHF UHF, Type C Charging
  • This digital SWR meter has frequency compensation function and can be used in a wide range. It is divided into three ranges: FMB (80-108MHz), VHF (110-299MHz), UHF (300-999MHz). The frequency range can be automatically switched or manually input.
  • The dot screen with 128 * 64 resolution ensures clear visibility, even in outdoor strong light conditions.
  • Featuring an aluminum alloy shell and a red dot button, this SWR meter has a novel and beautiful appearance. It is also built to last.
  • The TYPE-C charging interface allows for easy connection to the computer, enhancing convenience and versatility.
  • This SWR meter has a maximum power capacity of 120W, ensuring reliable and accurate power measurement.

products.fullDescription:
This is not just a clock; its an intelligent surveillance device that seamlessly blends into any environment. Whether you need to monitor your home, office, or any other space, this state-of-the-art device offers unparalleled security while maintaining a discreet appearance.

Key Features:

  1. Crystal Clear Full HD Recording: Experience superior clarity with 1080p Full HD video recording. Every detail is captured with precision, ensuring nothing goes unnoticed.

  2. Advanced Wi-Fi Connectivity: Monitor your space from anywhere in the world with real-time video streaming. The device connects effortlessly to your Wi-Fi network, allowing you to access live feeds directly from your smartphone, tablet, or computer.

  3. Elegant and Discreet Design: At first glance, this device appears to be a sleek, modern clock. Its covert design ensures it blends perfectly into any room, making it the ideal solution for discreet monitoring.

  4. Smart Motion Detection: The built-in motion detection feature automatically triggers recording when movement is detected, ensuring you capture only the most important moments. You will also receive instant alerts on your connected device, keeping you informed at all times.

  5. Infrared Night Vision: Equipped with infrared LEDs, this DVR clock captures clear footage even in complete darkness, providing round-the-clock security without compromising quality.

  6. Continuous Loop Recording: Never worry about running out of storage. The device supports loop recording, which automatically overwrites the oldest files when the memory is full, ensuring continuous operation.

  7. Flexible Storage Options: Store your recordings locally on a microSD card (supports up to 128GB) or opt for cloud storage, ensuring your footage is safe, secure, and easily accessible whenever needed.

  8. Long-Lasting Battery Life: Designed for endurance, the DVR Clock offers extended battery life, making it suitable for long-term monitoring. It can also be plugged in for uninterrupted 24/7 operation.

  9. User-Friendly Setup: Setting up the DVR Clock is a breeze, with a straightforward installation process that even beginners can manage. Comprehensive instructions and customer support are available to ensure you are up and running in no time

Choosing this product means choosing peace of mind, knowing that your space is protected by the most advanced and reliable technology available.

products.fullDescription:
Keep your sensitive data secure with our premium Faraday bag designed for tablets and laptops. This high-quality signal-blocking pouch effectively shields your device from wireless threats, including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, GPS, RFID, and cellular signals, ensuring complete privacy and protection.

Key Features:

Up to 99% Signal Blocking – Prevents hacking, tracking, and remote access by blocking all wireless signals.
Durable & High-Quality Materials – Made with multi-layer fabric for long-lasting protection.
Spacious Design – Large sizes that fit most tablets, laptops, and large electronic devices while maintaining a slim, portable profile.
Perfect for Privacy & Security – Ideal for travelers, business professionals, government officials, and anyone needing digital security.
Prevents Remote Hacking & Data Theft – Protects against cyber threats, identity theft, and remote access vulnerabilities.

NOTE: Faraday cages are never 100% effective. Shielding effectiveness will vary depending on the device shielded, proximity to the signal source (router, cell tower, satellite, etc.), the radio frequency/band used (GSM, 3G, LTE, 2.4/5GHz WiFi, etc.), and multiple other factors. For critical applications, we recommend placing the device in one bag, inside a second larger bag.

products.fullDescription:
The 433MHz Auto-Copy Remote Controller Duplicator is an easy-to-use, pocket-sized device designed to copy fixed-code 433 MHz remote controllers quickly and securely. Ideal for applications such as garage doors, car alarm systems, home security products and other short-range wireless remote controls, this duplicator supports a broad set of common encoder ICs so you can reproduce existing remotes without replacing the original unit.

The unit supports copying many widely used fixed-code chips and encoder series, allowing it to clone most conventional 433 MHz fixed remotes. Copying is one-to-one and each code is saved separately on the device to preserve privacy and prevent accidental overwrite. The device’s small size and low weight make it convenient to carry in a pocket or tool kit.

Applications:

  • Garage door remote duplication
  • Car alarm and remote key duplication
  • Home security remote duplication
  • Short-range wireless remote control products

What’s Included:

  • Remote Controller
  • Keyring and carabiner

Technical Specifications:

  • Working Frequency: 433 MHz
  • Buttons: 4, programmable separately
  • Battery Type: 12V 27A battery
  • Color: Black and chrome
  • Size: Approx. 6.8 x 1.6 x 1.5 cm

products.fullDescription:
A **Visual Door Viewer** is a security device installed on doors that allows users to see who is outside without opening the door. It typically features a **wide-angle lens** and can be either a **digital or analog** model. Key features include:

- **Clear Viewing**: Provides a clear visual of the area outside the door, with some models offering high-definition (HD) screens for a more detailed view.
- **Wide Viewing Angle**: Ensures a broad perspective, covering more of the area outside the door.
- **Digital Displays**: Many visual door viewers come with a digital screen, allowing for easy viewing in both daylight and low-light conditions. Some models even include night vision capabilities.
- **Easy Installation**: Simple to install, often replacing a traditional peephole with minimal effort.
- **Enhanced Security**: Increases safety by letting users identify visitors or potential threats before opening the door, offering added privacy and peace of mind.

Visual door viewers are commonly used in homes, offices, and commercial spaces for enhanced security and convenience.

- **High-Resolution Display**: Offers a clear, detailed view of visitors or surroundings on an LCD or LED screen, often in HD or higher resolution.
- **Wide Viewing Angle**: Typically features a wide-angle lens, ensuring that you can see a larger area outside the door.
- **Night Vision**: Many digital door viewers are equipped with infrared (IR) night vision, allowing you to clearly see visitors even in low light or complete darkness.
- **Easy Operation**: Simple to use with a one-touch or touchscreen interface for viewing and sometimes recording.
- **Multiple Functions**: Some models include additional features like motion detection, image capture, video recording, or the ability to connect to mobile devices.
- **Privacy and Security**: Enhances home security by providing a more detailed and secure way of viewing outside the door without opening it.

Digital door viewers are commonly used in residential and commercial settings to improve safety and convenience.

products.fullDescription:
The **7" LCD Monitor with HDMI, VGA, and RCA** is a compact, versatile display that supports multiple input options for various devices. Key features include:

- **7-Inch Screen**: A small, portable size ideal for use in tight spaces, or for applications like security systems, car cameras, or DIY projects.
- **HDMI Input**: Allows for high-definition video input from devices like computers, gaming consoles, or media players.
- **VGA Input**: Provides compatibility with older devices, such as desktops or laptops, that use VGA connections.
- **RCA Input**: Supports analog video and audio signals, commonly used for devices like older DVD players, game consoles, or security cameras.
- **High-Resolution Display**: Offers decent video quality, with a clear image for a variety of applications.
- **Multiple Use Cases**: Ideal for security monitoring, car backup cameras, media players, or as a secondary monitor for laptops or PCs.

This versatile LCD monitor is perfect for users who need a compact display with various connectivity options for both modern and legacy devices.

products.fullDescription:
Features:

- Easy to Check Fiber Faults - This visual fault locator can accurately detect and locate fiber breaks, poor connections, bending, or cracking. The detector will emit a 650nm bright light for fiber tracing, breaks or faults in the fiber will refract the light.
- Excellent Function - This VFL device is portable and easy for a field test with multiple functions such as constant output power, lower battery warning, long battery life, and long-distance detection.
- WIDELY USED - 2.5mm Universal Connector - the connector of the detector is compatibly designed for ST, SC, FC interferes both in circle and square shape of different fiber optic cables.
- LONG OUTPUT DISTANCE - This visual fault locator with battery output strong light goes 5 kilometers far, high effective power circuits allows for stable power.
- Practical Design - Small size and lightweight, pen-type design with pouch make it portable, easy to check fiber faults with visual fault locator, design with a stainless steel head and aluminum body to prevent crash and dust, the case ground design prevents ESD damage efficiently.

products.fullDescription: RG142 is a high-performance coaxial cable used in applications that require low-loss and reliable signal transmission. It has a 50-ohm impedance and is typically used for RF (radio frequency) and data communications. The cable features a solid Teflon dielectric insulation, which helps it handle high frequencies (up to 18 GHz) with minimal signal degradation. The center conductor is usually made of silver-plated copper or bare copper, and it has a braided shield for enhanced protection against electromagnetic interference (EMI). RG142 is often used in military, aerospace, and laboratory environments due to its durability, low attenuation, and ability to perform well in harsh conditions.

It has a 50-ohm impedance and is designed to carry high-frequency signals with minimal signal loss, typically up to 6 GHz. The cable features a solid center conductor (usually copper), a foam dielectric insulation, and a double shield (braided and foil) for enhanced protection against interference. Its construction makes it ideal for use in antenna systems, Wi-Fi, and networking setups, especially when a low-loss and high-performance cable is required for both indoor and outdoor environments. LMR400 is known for its durability, flexibility, and ease of installation.

It has a 50-ohm impedance and is commonly used in RF communication systems, including antennas, GPS systems, and other wireless applications. products.fullDescription: RG174 is a lightweight, flexible coaxial cable commonly used for low-power and low-frequency applications. It has a 50-ohm impedance and is typically used in situations where space constraints and flexibility are important, such as in mobile devices, antennas, GPS systems, and wireless communication equipment. The cable features a small diameter, with a center conductor made of either copper or silver-plated copper, surrounded by a dielectric insulation, and a braided shield for signal protection. While RG174 is not suitable for high-power or high-frequency transmissions, it works well for short-distance connections where minimal signal loss is required.

products.fullDescription: RG59 with DC is a type of coaxial cable commonly used for video, audio, and data transmission. It has a 75-ohm impedance, making it suitable for applications like CCTV, satellite, and cable TV systems. The "with DC" feature refers to the cable's ability to carry direct current (DC) signals, which is essential for powering devices like cameras or other equipment in security or surveillance systems. The RG59 cable typically has a copper center conductor, an insulating dielectric, and a braided shield to reduce signal interference. While RG59 is not as low-loss as some other coaxial cables (like RG6), it is still a popular choice for short to medium-distance connections.

products.fullDescription:
• Wireless Communication: The system uses radio frequency (around 433MHz or 462MHz, depending on the model) for clear, secure digital communication.
  • Range: It offers a communication distance of up to 1000 meters in open areas and approximately 40-100 meters with internal wall obstructions.
  • Scalability: A single host unit can typically connect to many extension units (up to 100 or even 999 extensions depending on the manufacturer).
  • Power: The units are powered by electricity and include a built-in rechargeable battery backup for continued operation during power outages.
  • Installation: It features a simple plug-and-use setup and can be placed on a desk or mounted on a wall.
  • Usage: You dial the ID number of the specific unit you wish to call, and press the call button to initiate a two-way conversation.

products.fullDescription:
• 7 CHANNELS & 3 DIGITAL CODE - wireless room-to-room intercom systems have ABC code selection, and 21 channels to choose from. (Each code with 7 channels from 1 to 6). Features an enhanced anti-interference and can work with other intercoms with the same digital channel code! You can add more intercoms to build wireless intercom systems for homes/businesses.

  • PORTABLE CHARGING BY POWER BANK - This Intercom System is compatible with Power Bank (5V 1A) making it easy to take these intercoms any place you want. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor usage. This device is easy to set up and install. The intercom has 2 slots and 4 rubber footpads on the back and can be mounted on a wall or table without scratching any surface.

  • EXCELLENT SIGNAL - Our wireless home intercom system provides you with clear and anti-interference sound quality. This room-to-room intercom set features VOX (voice-activated) function, allowing you to easily talk to each other hands-free without yelling through the house. It is convenient to call between long-distance rooms, like a house or office.

  • MULTIFUNCTIONAL INTERCOM SYSTEM - Our home intercom system has 4 main functions, including monitor, talk, group, and call. Widely used for office school business house communication, perfect for one-to-one, one-to-many communication, making your life and work communication become more convenient.

products.fullDescription:
It allows a wireless network to be expanded using multiple access points without the need for a wired backbone to link them. The repeater plugs into a standard wall socket and picks up the WIFI network of your box. He then repeats it, in order to increase its signal. Simply place the repeater where the WiFi signal is weak to enjoy a good Internet connection.

The kit contains 1 WiFi AP/Repeater, 1 RJ-45 cable (1 meter) and 1 quick installation guide.

Features
Dimensions: 81 x 52 x 57 mm
Frequency range: 2.41-2.48 GHz
Broadband: The existing wireless network can reach an area of up to 300 Mbps

Powerful 10xGigabit port router with a Quad-core 1.4Ghz CPU, 1GB RAM, SFP+ 10Gbps cage, dual band 2.4GHz / 5GHz 4x4 MIMO 802.11a/b/g/n/ac wireless and desktop case

RB4011 series - amazingly powerful routers with ten Gigabit ports, SFP+ 10Gbps interface and IPsec hardware acceleration for a great price!

The RB4011 uses a quad core Cortex A15 CPU, same as in our carrier grade RB1100AHx4 unit. The unit is equipped with 1GB of RAM, can provide PoE output on port #10 and comes with a compact and professional looking solid metal enclosure in matte black.

RB4011iGS+5HacQ2HnD-IN (WiFi model) is dual band, four chain unit with a supported data rate of up to 1733 Mbps in 5GHz. For legacy devices, the unit also has a dual chain 2GHz wireless card installed in miniPCI-e slot.

We have two versions available.

RB4011iGS+5HacQ2HnD-IN-US (USA) is factory locked for 2412-2462MHz, 5170-5250MHz and 5725-5835MHz frequencies. This lock can not be removed.

RB4011iGS+5HacQ2HnD-IN (International) supports 2412-2484MHz and 5150MHz-5875MHz range (Specific frequency range can be limited by country regulations).

products.fullDescription:
DS0402A-DP6 This is a high-performance, low-power 4+2 10/100Mbps Ethernet MCU POE switch, which is the prime choice for grouping medium and small LANs. It provides four 10/100Mbps POE ports plus two 10M/100Mbps UP LINK ports for connecting upstream devices with higher bandwidth. Store-and-forward technology is used to ensure that bandwidth is efficiently distributed to each port. Full wire-speed 100Gbps connectivity to workgroups or servers for easy plug-and-play. With this flexible, non-blocking architecture, user usage can be unrestricted by bandwidth and media networks. The switch supports half-duplex and full-duplex operation modes, each switch port supports adaptive function, the port adopts store-and-forward mode, the product has superior performance, easy to use, convenient and intuitive, providing an ideal networking solution for workgroup users or small LAN. 

Two、Applications
This switch is widely used in small LAN
Three、Product Features
◆ Supports IEEE 802.3az.
◆ Supports port aggregation (link aggregation).
◆ Support broadcast storm protection
◆ 6 10/100Mbps adaptive RJ45, support Auto-MDI/MDIX.
◆ Support 1K MAC address
◆ Support EEPROM configuration
◆ Support IEEE802.3 af/at.
◆ All ports support 2KV lightning protection.
◆ Support 16 VLAN (IEEE Std 802.1q).
◆ Support maximum forwarding packet length 1552/1336 bytes
◆ Support 25M clock, built-in power supply, standard hardware shell design.

products.fullDescription:
LS-DS0803A-G3 This is a high-performance, low-power 8+2 10/100Mbps Ethernet standard POE switch, which is the prime choice for grouping medium and small LANs. It provides eight 10/100Mbps POE ports plus two UP LINK 10/100/1000Mbps ports for connecting upstream devices with higher bandwidth. Store-and-forward technology is used to ensure that bandwidth is efficiently distributed to each port. Full wire-speed 100Mbps connectivity to workgroups or servers for easy plug-and-play. With this flexible non-blocking architecture, user usage can be unrestricted by bandwidth and media networks. The switch supports half-duplex and full-duplex operation modes, each switch port supports adaptive function, the port adopts store-and-forward mode, the product has superior performance, easy to use, convenient and intuitive, providing an ideal networking solution for workgroup users or small LAN.

Product Features
◆ Supports IEEE 802.3az.
◆ Supports port aggregation (link aggregation).
◆ Support broadcast storm protection
◆ 8 x 10/100Mbps and 2 x 1000M adaptive RJ45, support Auto-MDI/MDIX.
◆ Support EEPROM configuration
◆ Support IEEE802.3 af/at.
◆ All ports support 2KV lightning protection.
◆ Support 16 VLAN (IEEE Std 802.1q).
◆ Support maximum forwarding packet length 2048byte/9K Byte
◆ Support 25M clock, built-in power supply, standard hardware shell design.

This card allows the connection of up to 8 external analog lines (such as PSTN or analog trunks) to the PBX, enabling businesses to make and receive external calls through traditional telephone lines.

Key features include:
- **Supports 8 Analog Trunks**: Provides 8 ports for connecting external analog telephone lines (PSTN, analog trunks) to the PBX system.
- **Compatibility**: Specifically designed for the Panasonic KX-TE824 PBX system.
- **Cost-Effective Solution**: Ideal for businesses that use analog phone lines and need to integrate them into their PBX system.
- **Reliable Connectivity**: Ensures stable and reliable external call connectivity for businesses with analog trunks.

The KX-TE82480 is an essential card for businesses looking to expand their analog trunk capacity and maintain traditional telephone line connectivity within a Panasonic PBX system.

- **Cost-Effective Expansion**: A practical and affordable way to expand the capacity of the phone system by adding more analog extensions.

The KX-TE82483 is ideal for businesses that need to add more analog phones or devices to their Panasonic PBX system without significant upgrades.

products.fullDescription:
The **Panasonic KX-TES824** is a **hybrid PBX system** designed for small to medium-sized businesses. It integrates both analog and digital communication features, providing a flexible and cost-effective solution for managing internal and external communications.

Key features include:
- **Hybrid System**: Supports a combination of analog, digital, and hybrid extensions, allowing businesses to mix and match different types of telephones and devices.
- **Up to 24 Extensions**: The system can support up to 24 extensions, including both analog and digital phones.
- **4 External Lines**: It supports up to 4 external lines (PSTN or analog trunks), enabling businesses to make and receive external calls.
- **Call Management Features**: Offers essential call features such as call forwarding, voicemail, call waiting, and conference calling to improve communication efficiency.
- **Expandable**: The KX-TES824 can be expanded with additional cards to support more extensions and trunks as needed.

The **KX-TES824** is an ideal solution for small businesses looking for a reliable and affordable phone system that can handle both internal communication and external calls, with flexibility for future expansion.

products.fullDescription:
A Wireless Intercom System with Screen Display is a communication device designed for clear audio and visual interaction over extended distances. Here are its key features:

Key Features:

1. Long Range Communication: 
   - Capable of transmitting signals over several miles, depending on the environment and model specifications.
   - Ideal for homes, farms, warehouses, or office buildings.

2. Screen Display:
   - Equipped with a visual display that shows caller ID and communication status
   - Allows for visual interaction, enhancing communication clarity and convenience.

3. Wireless Technology:
   - Utilizes radio frequency (RF) for easy installation without the need for extensive wiring.
   - Reduces clutter and makes it easier to position units anywhere within range.

4. Two-Way Communication:
   - Enables simultaneous speaking and listening, much like a phone call.
   - Often includes a push-to-talk feature for efficient use.

5. Additional Features:
   - Include features like intercom call history, volume control, and adjustable ringtones.
   - Integration with smart home systems for added functionality.

6. Power Options:
   - Usually powered by rechargeable batteries or can be plugged into an outlet, providing flexibility in placement.

7. Durability:
   - Designed to withstand various environmental conditions, particularly if intended for outdoor use.

8. Applications:
- Home Use: Communication between rooms, monitoring children, or communicating with family members.
- Commercial Use: Effective in offices, warehouses, or retail environments for team communication.
- Outdoor Use: Suitable for farms or large properties for communication over long distances.

Overall, this system offers a convenient and efficient way to communicate visually and audibly across significant distances, making it a versatile tool for both personal and professional use.


Features:

1. Using 433MHz ISM public frequency: 433MHz

2. Air transfer range: 1000 meters

3. Transmitting Power: < 20dBm(<0.5W), Receive Sensitivity: <-100

4. DC 5V,or Li-ion battery power supply.

5. This audio intercom can make different combination, it supports maximum 9999 pcs intercoms

products.fullDescription:
The Grandstream DP720 is a DECT cordless VoIP handset designed for mobility and high-quality voice communication. It works with Grandstream's DP750, DP752, or DP755 base stations and supports up to 10 SIP accounts. The handset offers HD audio, a 3.5mm headset jack, and a long battery life of up to 20 hours of talk time. With a range of up to 350 meters outdoors, it's suitable for both business and home environments. Additional features include multi-language support and DECT security for encrypted communication.

products.fullDescription:
The **Panasonic KX-DT546** is a **digital desk phone** designed for business and office environments, part of Panasonic's **KX-NT500 series** of IP phones. It is known for its sleek design, advanced functionality, and high-quality communication features, making it suitable for professional use in environments requiring reliable and efficient phone systems.

### Key Features of the Panasonic KX-DT546:

1. **Large LCD Display**: The KX-DT546 features a **backlit 6-line LCD display**, making it easy to read caller information, call logs, and menu options, even in low-light conditions.

2. **Programmable Keys**: The phone includes **24 programmable keys**, which can be customized for quick access to frequently used functions, such as extensions, speed dials, or features like call forwarding and voicemail.

3. **Hands-Free Communication**: It supports **full-duplex speakerphone** functionality, allowing for clear, hands-free conversations without the need to pick up the handset.

4. **High-Quality Audio**: The phone offers **HD audio quality**, ensuring clear voice communication, making it ideal for business meetings or calls where sound clarity is crucial.

5. **IP Phone Compatibility**: The KX-DT546 is compatible with **IP-based phone systems** (VoIP), offering businesses flexibility in terms of installation and management, as well as the potential for reduced communication costs.

6. **Elegant Design**: The phone has a modern, professional appearance that fits well in corporate settings, with a **compact** and **ergonomic design** that promotes comfortable use.

7. **Power over Ethernet (PoE)**: The KX-DT546 supports **PoE**, which allows the phone to receive power and data over a single Ethernet cable, reducing the need for additional power adapters and simplifying installation.

The **Panasonic KX-DT546** is a versatile and feature-rich desk phone, perfect for office environments that need efficient communication, ease of use, and reliable performance for day-to-day business operations.

products.fullDescription:
The **Panasonic HDV130** is a **high-definition camcorder** designed for capturing video in a variety of professional and consumer applications. It's known for its **compact design** and **ease of use**, making it a popular choice for videographers and content creators who need high-quality footage in a portable package.

### Key Features of the Panasonic HDV130:

1. **HD Video Recording**: The camcorder offers high-definition video recording, typically in **1080p resolution**, ensuring sharp and clear video quality.
   
2. **Advanced Image Sensor**: The HDV130 is equipped with an **advanced image sensor** that helps in delivering clear, vibrant images, even in low-light conditions.

3. **Optical Zoom**: It typically includes a **powerful optical zoom**, allowing users to get close-up shots of distant subjects without losing image clarity.

4. **Easy Controls**: With an **intuitive interface**, users can easily adjust settings like focus, exposure, and white balance, providing a balance between automatic functionality and manual control.

5. **Long Battery Life**: It is designed to offer **long battery life**, making it suitable for extended shooting sessions.

6. **Multiple Connectivity Options**: The HDV130 includes **HDMI and USB ports**, providing easy connectivity to external devices like monitors, computers, and TVs for playback or file transfer.

The **Panasonic HDV130** is a reliable camcorder that delivers excellent performance in both professional and casual video production environments. It balances advanced features with portability, making it an ideal choice for creators who need HD quality without the complexity of larger, more expensive equipment.

products.fullDescription:
A **test phone** is a specialized device used primarily by technicians and engineers to **test, troubleshoot**, and **monitor telecommunications systems**. These phones are typically used in the field to diagnose issues with phone lines, networks, or communication equipment.

### Key Features of a Test Phone:

1. **Basic Functionality**: Test phones are designed to make and receive calls, but they often have additional features for diagnostics, such as being able to measure signal strength or identify line issues.

2. **Line Monitoring**: They can be used to check the **quality of phone lines** (analog or digital), including the presence of dial tone, line noise, or other communication problems.

3. **Troubleshooting Tools**: Test phones can help technicians identify **signal loss**, **connection issues**, and other faults in a telecommunication system, helping to quickly locate and resolve problems.

4. **Simulate Calls**: Some test phones can simulate various call scenarios, including outgoing and incoming calls, to ensure the system is functioning correctly.

5. **Durability**: Test phones are often designed to be **rugged** and able to withstand rough handling and fieldwork.

6. **Integrated Tools**: Some models have built-in features such as **tone generators**, **line identifiers**, or **signal detectors**, which help technicians in more advanced testing scenarios.

Test phones are crucial tools in ensuring reliable performance in telecommunications networks, especially for maintenance and installation in both residential and business environments.

  • A fantastic and easy way of joining cables together without the messy hard work.
  • Quick Connect:When using a terminal connector,there is no need to strip the insulation,just insert 2 wires into 2 ports.Crimp or squeeze the yellow button onto the inner two conductors.
  • Application:Suitable for two wire connections,such as telephone lines,speaker wires,wires,network cables,data cables,etc.,connectors for weak current connections,data signal lines and other conductors.
  • Applicable Core Diameter:0.4-0.7 mm,including insulation layer large diameter 1.52mm.
